Authorized access Talk to a specialist

Sectors

Technology for public and private operations.

Capability value depends on context. We adapt architecture, deployment, training and support to each sector’s reality.

Conceptual architecture

Defense and security

Technology capabilities for coordination, situational awareness, facility protection and support to authorized operations.

Government and justice

Solutions for organizations managing information, investigations, communications and institutional continuity.

Critical infrastructure

Integration of monitoring, communications, energy and protection for assets whose continuity is essential.

Energy and telecommunications

Operational visibility, inspection, connectivity and backup for distributed networks and remote sites.

Transport, ports and airports

Technology to monitor flows, protect perimeters, coordinate teams and respond to critical events.

Industry, mining and oil

Remote inspection, communications, asset monitoring and continuity in demanding industrial environments.

Corporate security

Technical assessment, information protection, monitoring and response for private organizations with sensitive operations.

Emergency response

Deployable systems to connect teams, observe affected areas and support decisions under pressure.

Adaptation

One principle, different missions.

Protecting a facility, inspecting an asset, maintaining connectivity or coordinating an emergency requires understanding risks, users, infrastructure and regulation. That is why we avoid generic solutions.

See the methodology

Eagle Commercial

Explore an architecture for your sector.

Talk with our team about the environment, assets and outcome you need.

Technology engineering and integration for organizations operating in critical environments.
